calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Robert N. Waver, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANC OF AMERICA LEASING & CAPITAL, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) EUROPEAN FOOD WHOLESALE, INC., a California corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows: Plaintiff Banc of america Leasing & Capital, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, have and recover from Defendant European Food Wholesale, Inc., a California corporation, possession of the following described equipment or the fair market value of the equipment in the amount of $25,200.00, if possession cannot be had, together with cost of suit incurred herein in the amount of $589.95.

Counsel to submit proposed judgment with the description of the equipment as stated by the court on the record.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Continued To Oct-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Continued To Sep-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
